# Goodly Development

> Goodly Development is a software, IT, and web engineering studio focused on practical delivery for growing teams.

## Canonical

- https://goodlydevelopment.com/

## Services

- Product development and integrations: https://goodlydevelopment.com/
- Managed IT services: https://goodlydevelopment.com/it-services
- Web development services: https://goodlydevelopment.com/web-services

## Support and Contact

- Support portal: https://goodlydevelopment.com/support

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jordan-allen-gd/
